documents.label: A copy of the minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A court order
Foster care certification
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: The form lists these under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative' as OR options — any one is sufficient. The minor's birth certificate appears here (authority) and also under childId.

parentId.notes: The form says 'provide one from each category' and lists these three under 'For proof of your identity' — any one is sufficient.

address.notes: The form does not list a separate proof-of-address document category. The guardian's current address is collected on the form itself but no supporting address document is required.

childId.notes: The form explicitly says 'For the minor, please provide BOTH of the following' — both the minor's Social Security card and birth certificate are required.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Proof of guardianship (if not named on child's birth certificate)
Driver's license or another government issued identification card (e.g. state ID card)
Child's Social Security card
Proof of address (bank statement, utility bill, or insurance statement)

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate establishes parentage/authority if the parent is named on it. If the parent is not named on the birth certificate, proof of guardianship (court order) is required instead. These are mutually exclusive alternatives depending on the situation.

childId.notes: The page explicitly lists both 'a copy of your child's birth certificate' AND 'a copy of your child's Social Security card' as required items with no indication that one can substitute for the other. Both are required.

mailingAddress.notes: The page lists two addresses: standard mail (PO Box 9554) and overnight mail (701 Experian Parkway). The standard mail address is the primary mailing address. Note: this page covers checking if a minor has a credit report; the same address is used for minor-related requests including security freezes per Experian's general minor request page.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Court order or legal guardianship document
Foster care placement document
Parent's government-issued ID
Power of attorney
Child's Social Security card or number
Parent's Social Security card or number
Utility bill or proof of address

authority.notes: The page requires one piece of documentation proving sufficient proof of authority. Guardianship/conservator documents are grouped under 'court' for the widget display.

parentId.notes: Page was blocked by Cloudflare and no content was retrievable. Options are inferred from TransUnion's known standard requirements.

address.notes: Page was blocked by Cloudflare and no content was retrievable. Options are inferred from TransUnion's known standard requirements.

childId.notes: Page was blocked by Cloudflare and no content was retrievable. Options are inferred from TransUnion's known standard requirements.

mailingAddress.notes: Page was blocked by Cloudflare; both the main page and the address-source page returned Cloudflare block errors. This address is TransUnion's known standard mailing address for a Protected Consumer (minor) freeze and should be verified against the live page.
